title: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Q3 Earnings Beat, Revenues Fall Y/Y
text: While Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) surpasses Q3 earnings and revenue estimates, softness in end markets and elongated sales cycles across product categories hurt results on a year-over-year basis.

title: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.87 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.76 per share. This compares to earnings of $4.12 per share a year ago.

title: Zebra Technologies Sees Sales Downturn Continuing Into 2024
text: Zebra Technologies beat analyst estimates for the third quarter but missed views with its outlook for the fourth quarter.

title: Zebra Technologies Announces Third-Quarter 2023 Results
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $ZBRA #earnings--Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA), an innovator at the edge of the enterprise with solutions and partners that enable businesses to gain a performance edge, today announced results for the third quarter ended September 30, 2023. “As expected, our third quarter results were impacted by broad-based end market softness and elongated sales cycles across our product categories, as well as distributor destocking,” said Bill Burns, Chief Executive Offic.

title: What's in Store for Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) in Q3 Earnings?
text: Zebra Technologies' (ZBRA) Q3 results are likely to benefit from cost-control measures and improving supply chains, partly offset by weakness in the mobile computing market.

title: Zebra Technologies to Release Third Quarter Results on Oct. 31
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA), a leading digital solution provider enabling businesses to intelligently connect data, assets, and people, will report its third quarter 2023 financial results on Tues. morning, Oct. 31, 2023. The company will also host a conference call to discuss these results on the same day at 7:30 a.m. CT (8:30 a.m. ET). To access the live webcast of the presentation, visit the events section of the company's website at inv.
